assumptions: best_followup_allocation branch index order matches candidate row branch order within each state
multistep_branch_utility_target is a bounded proxy and not an exact forced-k rollout
evaluation remains matched to canonical baseline_current_matched pair labels from regime_all_pairs
caveats: test support remains small across seeds (test pair counts: 7, 12, 4)
near-tie and strict matched canonical slices have very small denominators
state-level disagreement rates are directionally useful but unstable due to low state counts
